name: atomr-physical
description: Skills and plugins for working on projects that depend on atomr-physical, the physical sensing, output, and ROS2-integrated robotics layer for the atomr actor runtime.

plugins.name: atomr-physical-ai-skills
plugins.description: Skills for AI coding assistants working on projects that depend on atomr-physical — quickstart, sensing, actuation, robotics orchestration, the ROS2 bridge, the Python overlay, and troubleshooting.
